title: CP2 trio Mac-local fan-out — #115 G1 + #116 G3 + #117 atom-prep 5 dryrun baseline
commit_anchor_disclosure: raw 91 C3: the 7 dryrun outputs + 3 tool fixes were swept into a concurrent agent's commit message (docs(lint): hxc 4-lint CI gate proposal). Files + diff are correctly persisted and pushed; only the commit message is from a different task. This witness JSON serves as the trio-specific provenance ledger.

verdicts.g1_selftest: ok (pass_case=PASS consec=5, fail_case=FAIL consec=0, partial_case=FAIL consec=2)

tool_fixes_applied_pre_run.issue_1_main_double_invoke: trailing main() after fn main() triggered hexa-strict auto-invoke conflict (silent_failure_enforcement Class 1). Symptom: silent remote-dispatch double-invoke, helper write_file failed, python3 absent on remote → 'sh: python3: not found'. Fix: removed trailing main() in 3 tools.
tool_fixes_applied_pre_run.issue_2_argv_off_by_one: let mut j = 3 skipped subcommand token av[2]. Symptom: 'mock --output X' reached helper as '--output X', argparse rejected. Fix: j = 2 in 3 tools.
tool_fixes_applied_pre_run.fix_classification: baseline-blocking bug fixes, NOT new design content

raw_91_C1_C5.C3_evidence: 7 dryrun outputs + 3 tool diffs persisted; selftest text logs at /tmp/cp2_*_selftest.txt /tmp/cp2_*_mock.txt /tmp/cp2_atom_D{9..13}.txt
raw_91_C1_C5.C4_caveat: mock-NOT-real: dry-run/mock evidence ONLY. Real-evidence verdict requires P4 sweep on H100 (RunPod-blocked / vast.ai alt path). #117 actual atoms 0/5 landed (target 5/10 non-EEG); these mock-validate dryruns exercise validator pipeline only.

raw_10_honest: all 5 atom dryruns produced identical mock output (slot=11 delta=0.33) because mk_x_atom_generator.hexa mock-validate uses a fixed deterministic seed. This exercises the validator pipeline 5x but does NOT differentiate domains — domain dispatch is not in the mock-validate path. Real domain-aware atom generation requires the run subcommand with corpus inputs.
